'''Resht VII''' was a planet in the [[Resht system/Legends|Resht system]]. It was the headquarters of the [[House Salaktori|Salaktori Hunters Guild]], led by [[Jeslor Salaktori]].

*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''
